title: Biodiesel Plants Shut Down Across Iowa
content: The head of the Iowa Renewable Fuels Association says several biodiesel plants have idled across the state.  Monte Shaw tells Brownfield the plants stopped production after the blenders tax credit ended on December 31st. â€œThey were going to have all of these tax credits expire and then go into this new catch-all 45Z tax credit that people talk about. Well, the rules for that arenâ€™t out, so people canâ€™t claim it. Itâ€™s got the whole supply chain in flux.â€ He says heâ€™s disappointed in the lack of 45Z guidance from the federal government.
author: Analysts Account
